# IronWorks
> AI workforce orchestration platform by Steel Motion LLC

IronWorks lets businesses deploy and manage teams of AI agents that do real work. CEO, CTO, CFO, engineers, marketers — all AI, all managed from one dashboard.

## Key Features
- War Room: Real-time operational dashboard
- Agent Performance: A-F ratings with cost efficiency metrics
- Knowledge Base: Shared company brain with markdown editor
- Playbooks: Multi-step reusable workflows
- Org Chart: Visual hierarchy with team packs
- Messaging: Telegram, Email, Slack, Discord integrations

## Pricing
- Starter: $79/month (5 projects, unlimited agents)
- Growth: $199/month (25 projects, 2 companies)
- Business: $599/month (unlimited projects, 5 companies)
- All plans: Unlimited AI agents, BYOK (bring your own API keys)
